title: Emma's Sleepy Stars
synopsis: Little Emma discovers the magic of bedtime as she watches the stars appear and prepares for sleep with her loving family.

pages.text: Emma looks up at the sky. The sun is going down. Soon it will be time for sleep.

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks standing by a window looking up at the evening sky with soft watercolor, dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars beginning to appear, gentle moonlight filtering through clouds, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette
illustration.alt: Emma looking out window at evening sky

pages.text: Mama comes to Emma. 'Look,' says Mama. 'The stars are coming out.' Emma sees one star. Then two stars. Then many stars.

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks standing next to Mama pointing at the night sky filled with soft watercolor, dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars scattered across floating clouds, gentle moonlight, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette
illustration.alt: Emma and Mama looking at stars in the night sky

pages.text: Papa picks up Emma. 'Time for bed, little star,' he says. Emma yawns. She feels sleepy now.

illustration.description: Papa holding Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks as she yawns sleepily, surrounded by soft watercolor, dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars, floating clouds, gentle moonlight creating an ethereal atmosphere with pastel palette

pages.text: In her bed, Emma looks at the stars through her window. 'Night night, stars,' she whispers. The stars twinkle back. Emma closes her eyes and sleeps.

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks lying peacefully in bed with round sleepy face, moonlight streaming through window showing soft watercolor, dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars twinkling outside, floating clouds, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette
illustration.alt: Emma sleeping peacefully in bed with stars visible through window

metadata.illustrationStyle: soft watercolor, dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars, round sleepy faces, floating clouds, gentle moonlight, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette

questions.question: What does Emma see in the sky?
questions.explanation: Emma sees stars appearing in the evening sky as it gets dark.

questions.question: Who helps Emma get ready for bed?
questions.explanation: Mama shows Emma the stars and Papa carries her to bed.

questions.question: What does Emma say to the stars?
questions.explanation: Emma whispers 'Night night, stars' before going to sleep.
